query: SELECT tu.id, tu.tenantId, tu.email, tu.name, tu.role, tu.passwordHash, tu.isActive, t.companyName FROM tenantUsers tu LEFT JOIN tenants t ON tu.tenantId = t.id ORDER BY tu.id
